'''Vop the Usurer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] tyrant. He had a reputation for an abrasive style and an odor of cheap [[raava]].

==Biography==
Vop's main rival was a [[Bimm (disambiguation)|Bimm]] named [[Ritinki]]. The two had agreed to meet aboard the [[Ithorian Herdship]] ''[[Song of the Clouds]]'' to discuss a possible alliance. While among the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]], Vop had planned to purchase a sealed [[lockbox]] containing an infamous [[Hapan]] [[Gun of Command]], desired by many [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Rintinki found out about the arrangements, and in an attempt to spoil the transaction and acquire the gun for himself, had Vop's [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] accountant [[Lyle Lippstroot]] neutralized and replaced with a duplicate.

Unbeknown to either of the crimelords, [[Guttu]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] also desired the box and had dispatched a team to steal it. When Vop and Ritinki's meeting did go ahead, Vop was shot in the back during an ensuing firefight. The gun was captured by Guttu's agents, who decided to sell it to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] for a profit instead.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|15|The Great Herdship Heist}} {{1st}}
